name: Hightouch
description: Hightouch reverse ETL platform. Monitor sync health, data pipeline availability, and source/destination configuration.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Hightouch at https://app.hightouch.com
2. Go to Settings > API Keys
3. Create a new API key
4. Copy the key and enter it below

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Hightouch syncs are active, not disabled, and completing successfully.

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Hightouch syncs have recent successful runs, indicating active monitoring of data pipelines.

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists all Hightouch sources and destinations to provide a complete inventory of the data pipeline infrastructure.
